description: Following the 2015 emissions scandal, Volkswagen initiated a massive, existential pivot toward electric vehicle manufacturing. The public perception shifted from widespread distrust of the brand's engineering ethics to cautious optimism regarding their aggressive 'Electric For All' platform strategy by 2018.

key_events.description: EPA announces Volkswagen violated the Clean Air Act.
VW announces executive leadership changes and commitment to EV infrastructure.
Launch of the ID. series concept cars receives positive press coverage.
Global sales of VW EVs begin to outpace internal combustion engine growth.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling long-term recovery of brand reputation via strategic pivot.
